authSignInSubtitle: Log in to continue your health journey with personalized nutrition insights.
authSignUpSubtitle: Create your account to save scans, sync your history, and personalize results.
authInvalidPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
profileEditSubtitle: Choose what matters to you so Sehat Sathi can personalize ingredient warnings and guidance.
profileLogoutFailed: Unable to log out right now.
scannerSubtitle: Take a photo or select an image from your device, similar to a QR scanner flow on mobile web.
scannerNoImageHint: Use camera or choose a file to preview it here.
scannerMethodSubtitle: Works on Flutter Web using browser camera capture and file selection.
scannerTakePhotoSubtitle: Open camera capture from the browser, like a QR scanner.
scannerChooseDeviceSubtitle: Pick an existing image file from your phone or computer.
scannerUploadReady: The image has been stored securely and is ready for OCR.
resultNoGoodIngredients: No clearly positive ingredients stood out in the current educational rule set.
resultNoWatchIngredients: No major watch-out ingredients stood out in the current educational rule set.
analysisSummaryPositiveWithItems: Some ingredients such as {items} support a more positive read.
analysisSummaryPositiveEmpty: The ingredient list does not show many clearly positive signals in the current rule set.
analysisSummaryCautionWithItems: At the same time, ingredients like {items} are worth a closer look.
analysisSummaryCautionEmpty: No major watch-out ingredients stood out strongly in the current rule set.
analysisSummaryWarningEmpty: This summary is educational and should be read alongside the nutrition label and serving size.
analysisReasonWholeWheat: Whole grains are often a better source of fiber than refined flour.
analysisReasonOats: Oats are commonly associated with fiber and a steadier energy release.
analysisReasonMillet: Millets are often included for their fiber and whole-grain value.
analysisReasonNuts: Nuts can contribute healthy fats, though portion size still matters.
analysisReasonAlmond: Almonds may contribute healthy fats and some protein.
analysisReasonPeanut: Peanuts can be nutritious, but they are also a common allergen.
analysisReasonSugar: Added sugar can make a product less balanced, especially when it appears early in the list.
analysisReasonGlucose: Glucose-based sweeteners can raise the overall sugar load of a product.
analysisReasonCornSyrup: Corn syrup is another added sweetener to watch for in packaged foods.
analysisReasonMaida: Refined flour usually offers less fiber than whole-grain alternatives.
analysisReasonRefinedWheatFlour: Refined wheat flour is less nutrient-dense than whole-grain flour.
analysisReasonSodium: Higher sodium ingredients may matter for people monitoring blood pressure.
analysisReasonSalt: Salt can add to the overall sodium content of a product.
analysisReasonPalmOil: Palm oil is often used in processed foods and may increase saturated fat intake.
analysisReasonHydrogenated: Hydrogenated fats are worth watching because they can signal a more processed product.
analysisReasonPreservative: Preservatives are common in packaged foods and may indicate heavier processing.
analysisReasonArtificialFlavor: Artificial flavors can be a sign that the product is more highly processed.
analysisReasonCocoa: Cocoa can add flavor with less reliance on artificial ingredients.
analysisWarningDairyMessage: This ingredient list appears to include dairy-related terms. If you avoid dairy, review the package carefully.
analysisWarningGlutenMessage: This ingredient list appears to include gluten-related grains. If you avoid gluten, this product may not be suitable.
analysisWarningPeanutMessage: Peanut-related terms were detected. If you have a peanut allergy, treat this as a high-priority check.
analysisWarningSugarMessage: Several sweetening ingredients were detected. For diabetes management, it may help to compare portion sizes and total sugar before choosing this product.
analysisWarningSodiumMessage: Sodium-related ingredients were detected. If you monitor blood pressure, this may be worth a closer look.
analysisWarningHealthyEatingMessage: This product appears to lean more processed than whole-food focused. It may be worth comparing with a simpler ingredient list.
analysisWarningWeightLossMessage: Added sweeteners may make this product easier to overconsume. Looking at serving size can help put it in context.
analysisWarningLimitedMessage: The ingredient list was read, but only a few ingredients matched the current rule set. Treat this as educational guidance, not a medical judgment.
